turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Uh, good morning. Main Dr. Ramesh Patil se milna chahta hoon, orthopaedic wale. Kab available hain woh?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Good morning! Dr. Ramesh Patil is available on Monday, Wednesday, and Friday from 10 AM to 1 PM. Aapko kaunse din aana convenient rahega?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Friday theek rahega. Morning slot dijiye.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Friday ke liye 10:30 AM ka slot available hai. Aapka naam aur contact number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Perfect. Appointment book ho gayi — Mr. Vijay Kulkarni, Dr. Ramesh Patil ke saath, is Friday 10:30 AM. Confirmation SMS aayega aapke number pe.
